title: Content Safety
readOnlyNotice: Only workspace owners can edit Content Safety settings.

sections.policyHint: Master switch and sensitivity tier for this workspace
sections.statsHint: Events detected in the past 30 days
sections.customPatternsHint: Add your own regex-based rules to detect internal data
sections.recentEventsHint: Last 10 DLP events in this workspace

sensitivity.label: Sensitivity tier
sensitivity.lenientDesc: Lenient — only flags high-confidence, high-severity matches. Fewer false positives.
sensitivity.balancedDesc: Balanced — default. Flags most patterns across all severities.
sensitivity.strictDesc: Strict — flags all matches including low-confidence and low-severity patterns.

customPatterns.empty: No custom patterns. Add one to start detecting internal data.
customPatterns.name: Name

llm.guidancePromptPlaceholder: Describe what confidential or restricted content looks like for this workspace...

test.title: Test classifier
test.placeholder: Paste a sample of text to classify...

violationModal.intro: Content Safety flagged the following items in your message. Review them before sending.
violationModal.blockHint: This message cannot be sent — fix the highlighted issues first.

aws_access_key.name: AWS access key
aws_access_key.reason: Looks like an AWS access-key ID. Sharing it can grant full account access.

aws_secret_key.name: AWS secret key
aws_secret_key.reason: Looks like an AWS secret key. Treat it like a password and rotate immediately.

anthropic_api_key.name: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.reason: Looks like an Anthropic API key. Sharing it grants billed access to your account.

openai_api_key.name: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.reason: Looks like an OpenAI API key. Sharing it grants billed access to your account.

github_pat.name: GitHub PAT
github_pat.reason: Looks like a GitHub personal access token. Revoke it if it leaks outside trusted channels.

google_api_key.name: Google API key
google_api_key.reason: Looks like a Google API key. Anyone with this key can call the API on your project.

slack_token.name: Slack token
slack_token.reason: Looks like a Slack token. Sharing it can give bot or user access to your workspace.

stripe_secret.name: Stripe secret
stripe_secret.reason: Looks like a Stripe secret key. Sharing it exposes payment-processing privileges.

private_key_pem.name: Private key (PEM)
private_key_pem.reason: Looks like a private cryptographic key. Never share private keys in chat.

jwt_token.name: JWT
jwt_token.reason: Looks like a JSON Web Token. It may grant authenticated access until it expires.

credit_card.name: Credit card
credit_card.reason: Looks like a credit-card number. Avoid sending payment data through chat.

iban.name: IBAN
iban.reason: Looks like a bank IBAN. Share account numbers only over trusted channels.

national_id_us_ssn.name: US SSN
national_id_us_ssn.reason: Looks like a US Social Security Number. This is highly sensitive personal data.

national_id_iran.name: Iran national ID
national_id_iran.reason: Looks like an Iranian national ID. This is highly sensitive personal data.

email.name: Email address
email.reason: Contains an email address. Confirm the recipient is allowed to receive it.

phone_intl.name: Phone number
phone_intl.reason: Contains a phone number. Confirm the recipient is allowed to receive it.

ipv4_private.name: Private IPv4
ipv4_private.reason: Contains a private IPv4 address that may reveal internal network details.

high_entropy_token.name: High-entropy token
high_entropy_token.reason: Looks like a random token or secret. Verify it is not a credential before sending.

internal_hostname.name: Internal hostname
internal_hostname.reason: Matches an internal hostname. Avoid leaking infrastructure details externally.

ai_smart_scan.name: Smart scan
ai_smart_scan.reason: An AI classifier flagged this content as confidential or restricted.

events.viewAllHint: Switch to the Activity tab to see the full event log.

errors.fixRegex: Fix invalid regex patterns before saving
